message:
feat(esm-cjs): add compatibility-mode-aware corpus with evidence hash verification

Split cjs_requires_esm_named specimen into native (expected LinkFailure,
ERR_REQUIRE_ESM) and bun_compat (expected Success via sync bridge) variants.
Add compatibility_mode field to InteropSpecimenEvidence and InteropParityEvent.
Derive mode from specimen ID tags via specimen_compatibility_mode().

Replace fragile format-string concatenation in compute_evidence_hash with
InteropSpecimenEvidence::compute_hash()/verify_hash() using canonical JSON
serialization. Tighten contract_satisfied() to verify all evidence hashes.
Add EsmCjsParityVerdict as_str() and Display impls. Expand
DeterministicModuleResolver integration via build_module_definition().

Tests cover native vs bun-compat distinction, tampered evidence hash rejection,
and hash sensitivity to error_detail and binding_verdicts changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
